Package neqsim.process.measurementdevice

Enum Class SensorFaultType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SensorFaultType>
neqsim.process.measurementdevice.SensorFaultType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SensorFaultType>, Constable
public enum SensorFaultType extends Enum<SensorFaultType>
Types of sensor faults that can be injected into a measurement device for dynamic simulation testing. These faults model common transmitter failure modes encountered in industrial process control systems.

Fault injection is configured on a MeasurementDeviceBaseClass using MeasurementDeviceBaseClass.setFault(SensorFaultType, double) and cleared with MeasurementDeviceBaseClass.clearFault().

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    BIAS
    A constant bias (offset) is added to the true measurement.
    LINEAR_DRIFT
    Output drifts linearly over time.
    NOISE_BURST
    A burst of Gaussian noise with amplitude given by the fault parameter is added to the measurement.
    NONE
    No fault present; normal operation.
    SATURATION
    The measurement is clamped at the fault parameter value (saturation).
    STUCK_AT_VALUE
    Output is frozen at a fixed value regardless of the actual process measurement.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • NONE

      public static final SensorFaultType NONE
      No fault present; normal operation.

    • STUCK_AT_VALUE

      public static final SensorFaultType STUCK_AT_VALUE
      Output is frozen at a fixed value regardless of the actual process measurement.

    • LINEAR_DRIFT

      public static final SensorFaultType LINEAR_DRIFT
      Output drifts linearly over time. The fault parameter specifies the drift rate in engineering units per second.

    • BIAS

      public static final SensorFaultType BIAS
      A constant bias (offset) is added to the true measurement.

    • NOISE_BURST

      public static final SensorFaultType NOISE_BURST
      A burst of Gaussian noise with amplitude given by the fault parameter is added to the measurement. Unlike the baseline noise configured via MeasurementDeviceBaseClass.setNoiseStdDev(double), noise-burst faults are intended for transient disturbance testing.

    • SATURATION

      public static final SensorFaultType SATURATION
      The measurement is clamped at the fault parameter value (saturation). Values above the saturation limit are reported at the limit; values below pass through unchanged. Use a negative fault parameter for low-side saturation.

  • Constructor Details

    • SensorFaultType

      private SensorFaultType()

    • valueOf

      public static SensorFaultType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
